name: pressure events duplicate idempotency key dedupes

input.playerInput: I ask what the posted deadline costs us.

narrator.prose: The clerk posts the deadline publicly; every helper now risks being named if the Warden misses it.

pressureEvents.evidenceQuote: every helper now risks being named

humanConsequence.whatGetsHarder: The PC must act without exposing helpers.
humanConsequence.whatIsAtRisk: The PC's reputation and local support.
humanConsequence.visiblePressure: The deadline is public and helpers can be named.
